name: hourly: name + arrival time parks a pending booking and offers the 1/2/3 duration menu at this property's rates (B9/F17)
comment: The arrival time has to survive until the guest's NEXT message, which is a separate serverless invocation with no shared memory. It is persisted as a booking row with Check In set and Check Out still blank — per B8's blank-date rule that row holds no room and blocks nothing, so an abandoned one is inert rather than phantom inventory. Check In is asserted by time-of-day only (12:00Z = 14:00 SAST): whether it lands today or tomorrow depends on the clock at run time, and that roll is itself pinned in test/hourly.test.js.
